Meaning.Vi: Sự hoảng loạn; cơn hoảng loạn
Meaning.En: A sudden feeling of fear or anxiety that is so strong as to prevent clear thinking and rational behavior.
Meaning.Example: She felt a wave of panic when she realized she had missed her flight.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống bị kẹt trong thang máy và không thể gọi giúp đỡ.
Situation.En: Being trapped in an elevator with no way to call for help.

Situation.Vi: Hành khách hoảng loạn khi máy bay gặp turbulence mạnh.
Situation.En: Passengers panicking when the plane encounters severe turbulence.

Meaning.En: To become overwhelmed with fear or anxiety, especially in a way that causes irrational behavior.
Meaning.Example: He panicked when he couldn’t find his passport before the interview.

Situation.Vi: Nhân viên y tế hoảng loạn khi bệnh nhân đột ngột ngưng tim.
Situation.En: The medical staff panicked when the patient suddenly went into cardiac arrest.

Situation.Vi: Cô ấy hoảng loạn khi phát hiện nhà bị trộm.
Situation.En: She panicked when she discovered her house had been burglarized.
